project.name: PipeVision AI Extension
project.scope: Initial experiment (YOLO26m on SageMaker) → public browser-based demo
project.useCase: UTS assignment demo + portfolio public demo (A+D)

constraints: Zero infrastructure ops, zero cost, 24/7 availability
All user-visible strings: English (no i18n in v1)

techStack.styling: Tailwind CSS + CSS variables (DESIGN.md HSL tokens)

agents.backend-engineer: Model conversion (Python), HF Spaces app, ML retraining experiments
agents.frontend-engineer: React UI, ORT runtime wiring, state management, Service Worker

sprints.name: Model extraction + ONNX conversion
sprints.gate: ONNX export passes + |Δ mAP@0.5| < 0.005 + HF Hub model URL public
sprints.fallbackOnFailure: Promote sprint-2 HF Spaces app as the primary demo path

tasks.title: model/download.sh — extract best.pt from SageMaker S3
acceptanceCriteria: Script downloads model.tar.gz from SageMaker S3 bucket
Documented S3 URI variable (env or arg)

tasks.title: model/export.py — PT -> ONNX FP16 (half=True, dynamic=False, nms=False)
acceptanceCriteria: ORT optimizer applied (constant fold + op fusion)

tasks.title: model/verify.py — PT vs ONNX mAP regression test
acceptanceCriteria: Runs inference on valid set (196 images) for both PT and ONNX

tasks.title: model/metadata.yaml + HF Hub README.md (model card)
acceptanceCriteria: metadata.yaml contains model info, 7 classes with severity, inference thresholds, metrics
README.md (model card) with dataset, training config, metrics table from PDF, intended use, limitations

tasks.title: model/upload.sh — create HF Hub model repo and push artifacts
acceptanceCriteria: Pushes model.onnx, metadata.yaml, README.md to huggingface.co/<user>/pipevision-yolo26m
Public repo accessible via HTTPS with CORS-friendly headers

tasks.title: Register mise tasks: model:download, model:export, model:verify, model:upload
.gitignore additions (model/artifacts/, *.onnx, *.pt, *.tar.gz)
acceptanceCriteria: .gitignore prevents binary artifacts from being committed
model/artifacts/ excluded but model/ source files tracked

sprints.name: HF Spaces fallback + project bootstrap
sprints.gate: bun run dev shows sidebar + 4 empty routes; HF Spaces demo URL is live

tasks.title: HF Spaces Gradio app (app.py, requirements.txt, README.md)
acceptanceCriteria: Gradio app loads best.pt and exposes detect(image, conf, iou)

tasks.title: Vite + React 19 + bun + TypeScript project init
acceptanceCriteria: package.json with react@19, react-dom@19, vite@6+, typescript
bun run dev serves Vite dev server

tasks.title: Tailwind + shadcn/ui + DESIGN.md HSL tokens to :root CSS vars
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js extends theme using CSS variables
All HSL tokens from DESIGN.md sections 1.2 (background, fg, accent, severity, functional, border) ported
shadcn/ui CLI initialized; sample button renders with theme

tasks.title: biome + commitlint + mise dev tasks (dev, build, lint, test)
acceptanceCriteria: Husky pre-commit hook running biome + commitlint

tasks.title: HashRouter + 4 route shells (dashboard/detect/history/models)
acceptanceCriteria: Each route renders empty page component (placeholder)

tasks.title: widgets/app-sidebar/ (mockup .sidebar markup translated)
acceptanceCriteria: 4 nav items with active state via NavLink

tasks.title: app/app.tsx layout shell (sidebar + outlet)
acceptanceCriteria: ThemeProvider + ModelProvider wrapping (providers stubbed for now)

tasks.title: GitHub Actions deploy workflow (gh-pages)
acceptanceCriteria: Steps: bun install, bun run build, upload-pages-artifact, deploy-pages

sprints.name: Detect page + inference module + model loading UX
sprints.gate: Desktop upload -> bbox visualization < 3s after warmup; 7 classes correctly colored per DESIGN.md severity

tasks.title: features/inference/runtime.ts — ORT session + WebGPU/WASM EP detection
acceptanceCriteria: Detects WebGPU support; falls back to WASM SIMD
Session creation logged with EP used and elapsed ms

tasks.title: features/inference/preprocess.ts — letterbox + Float16Array
acceptanceCriteria: Resizes preserving aspect ratio with letterbox padding
Outputs Float16Array tensor [1,3,640,640] + scale + pad metadata

tasks.title: features/inference/postprocess.ts — NMS + coordinate restoration
acceptanceCriteria: Parses raw output tensor shape [1, 4+nc, 8400] or transposed
Filters by conf threshold, runs greedy NMS by IoU threshold
Restores box coordinates to original image space using scale/pad

tasks.title: features/inference/progress-tracker.ts — fetch + ReadableStream progress
acceptanceCriteria: onProgress called with (loaded, total) for each chunk

tasks.title: app/providers/model-provider.tsx — ModelStatus state machine
acceptanceCriteria: Phase transitions: idle -> fetching -> compiling -> warming -> ready
Cache hit path: idle -> compiling -> ready (source: 'cache')

tasks.title: Service Worker (public/service-worker.ts) + register-sw.ts
acceptanceCriteria: Cache-first strategy for HF Hub model URL
Repeat visit serves model from cache (verified in DevTools)

tasks.title: widgets/model-loader-banner/ (top of /detect)
acceptanceCriteria: Shows progress bar + downloaded/total MB + remaining estimate
Error state shows Retry + HF Spaces fallback link

tasks.title: widgets/image-dropzone/ (drag&drop + click upload)
acceptanceCriteria: Validates dimensions and shows error toast on rejection
Keyboard accessible (Tab + Enter triggers file picker)

tasks.title: widgets/detection-canvas/ (bbox + label overlay)
acceptanceCriteria: Box color uses DESIGN.md severity scale via class-color.ts

tasks.title: widgets/detection-result-panel/ (right side details)
acceptanceCriteria: Lists detections with class, confidence, bbox coordinates
Hover row highlights corresponding bbox in canvas
Aggregate count by class displayed at top

tasks.title: widgets/confidence-slider/ + widgets/class-legend/
acceptanceCriteria: Two sliders: conf (0-1, default 0.25), IoU (0-1, default 0.45)
Re-runs postprocess on slider change without re-running model
Legend lists 7 classes with severity colors and counts

tasks.title: features/samples/catalog.ts + 6-10 sample images
acceptanceCriteria: Each sample has metadata (class, source, license)
Mobile samples-only mode shows precomputed result thumbnails

tasks.title: shared/lib/webgpu.ts + device.ts + mode branching
acceptanceCriteria: Mode exposed via context for components

tasks.title: pages/detect/detect-page.tsx assembly
acceptanceCriteria: Layout: dropzone + canvas + result panel + slider
End-to-end flow: upload -> preprocess -> infer -> postprocess -> render
Mobile shows samples-only carousel instead of dropzone

sprints.name: Dashboard / History / Models pages
sprints.gate: All 4 pages visually match mockup; IndexedDB roundtrip works (save -> reload -> see)

tasks.title: features/history-store/db.ts — Dexie schema (HistoryRecord)
acceptanceCriteria: Dexie schema version 1 with HistoryRecord table
Migration path documented for future schema bumps

tasks.title: features/history-store/repository.ts — CRUD + pagination + filter
acceptanceCriteria: createRecord, getById, list({page, size, filter}), deleteAll

tasks.title: widgets/stat-card/ (5 variants: inspections/defects/accuracy/processing/model-status)
acceptanceCriteria: Pulls live data from history-store and model-provider
Empty state when no history (e.g., 'Run your first detection')

tasks.title: widgets/recent-detections/ (IndexedDB → grid)
acceptanceCriteria: Shows last 6 records with thumbnail + top class + confidence
Click navigates to /history with that record opened

tasks.title: widgets/defect-distribution-chart/ (recharts bar/donut)
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregates detections across history by class

tasks.title: widgets/history-table/ + widgets/history-filter-bar/
acceptanceCriteria: Bulk actions: delete selected, clear all (with confirm dialog)

tasks.title: features/export/csv-exporter.ts (Blob)
acceptanceCriteria: Exports filtered history to CSV via Blob + a[download]
Column header: id, createdAt, class, confidence, bbox, modelVersion

tasks.title: pages/history/history-page.tsx assembly
acceptanceCriteria: Filter bar + table + pagination + export button

tasks.title: widgets/metrics-table/ (PDF Test/Validation tables)
acceptanceCriteria: Two tables side by side or tabbed: Test, Validation
Columns: Class, Images, Instances, Precision, R, mAP@0.5, mAP@0.5:0.95

tasks.title: widgets/per-class-chart/ (per-class mAP bar chart)
acceptanceCriteria: Bar chart of mAP@0.5 per class
Sorted descending or by class id

tasks.title: widgets/training-curve-chart/ (loss/mAP curves)
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart with epoch on x-axis
Series: train loss, val loss, mAP@0.5

tasks.title: widgets/future-work-cards/ (PDF Further Experiments x6)
acceptanceCriteria: 6 cards: Data Aug, Class Imbalance, Attention, Multi-scale, Extended Training, Faster R-CNN
Each card: status badge ('Planned'), description, expected impact

tasks.title: pages/models/models-page.tsx assembly
acceptanceCriteria: Includes YOLO26 architecture diagram from PDF Figure 1

tasks.title: Auto-save detection to history (hook into T3.15)
acceptanceCriteria: After successful detection, record persisted to IndexedDB

sprints.name: Polish + deploy
sprints.gate: Public URL passes all verification scenarios from design doc §11; Lighthouse Perf ≥85, A11y ≥95

tasks.title: Honest metrics audit (Detection Accuracy = 0.44)
acceptanceCriteria: All numerical claims sourced from PDF or live IndexedDB
No invented metrics anywhere in UI

tasks.title: WCAG AA audit (focus rings, aria, keyboard nav)
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements have visible focus state

tasks.title: HF Space ↔ main site cross-links
acceptanceCriteria: Main site footer has 'Server-side demo' link to HF Space
/models page mentions both client and server demo paths
HF Space README links back to GitHub Pages site

tasks.title: README.md update (live demo URLs, stack, references)
acceptanceCriteria: Live demo URL + HF Space URL + HF Hub model URL
Tech stack badges, references to PDF citations

tasks.title: GitHub Pages production deploy + custom domain review
acceptanceCriteria: Custom domain decision documented (use or skip)

sprints.name: Client-side enhancements
sprints.gate: Each task ships independently behind a feature flag if needed

tasks.title: Background model prefetch on Dashboard mount
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard mounts triggers low-priority fetch via fetch({priority:'low'})

tasks.title: Move inference to Web Worker (after profiling)
acceptanceCriteria: Profile main-thread frame drops first; only adopt if >16ms blocks observed
Worker uses comlink or postMessage with transferable
ORT WebGPU EP works in worker context (or document fallback)

tasks.title: INT8 quantization + mobile full-inference mode
acceptanceCriteria: INT8 model exported via ORT static quantization (calibration set ~200 imgs)
Mobile mode upgraded from samples-only to full when model loaded

tasks.title: i18n (ko/en) via i18next or ARB
acceptanceCriteria: All UI strings extracted to translation files

tasks.title: Anonymous telemetry (P95 latency, EP distribution)
acceptanceCriteria: Local-first aggregation in IndexedDB; opt-in for external send
If external: PostHog or simple beacon (no PII)

tasks.title: Video / live camera detection (/detect-video route)
acceptanceCriteria: Frame extraction at 1-2 FPS via requestVideoFrameCallback

sprints.name: Model improvements (PDF Further Experiments)
sprints.estimatedDays: out-of-scope for v1, runs on SageMaker/Colab
sprints.gate: Each retrained model passes sprint-1 verify.py and replaces HF Hub artifact
sprints.notes: Each task ends by re-running T1.2 → T1.5 to publish new model. Demo auto-reflects via same HF Hub URL.

tasks.title: Mosaic + random crop + affine transform augmentation
Class-balanced sampling + Focal Loss
acceptanceCriteria: Crack does not regress despite higher relative weight on rare classes

tasks.title: CBAM or Deformable Attention in backbone
acceptanceCriteria: Crack and Joint offset mAP@0.5 improves ≥10%

tasks.title: FPN/PAN + Task-Aligned Label Assignment (TAL)
acceptanceCriteria: Debris and Crack localization quality improves

tasks.title: Extended training with new augmentation combo
acceptanceCriteria: Train to convergence (no val loss improvement for 50 epochs)

tasks.title: Faster R-CNN baseline comparison
acceptanceCriteria: Faster R-CNN trained on same dataset/split
Comparison report: mAP, latency, model size

summary.biggestRisk: R1: YOLO26m ONNX export failure (mitigated by T2.1 HF Spaces fallback ready by Sprint 2)
